SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement ("Agreement") is made on this 5th day of October, 2023.

BETWEEN:

1. Dr. Emily Tan (NRIC: S2345678A)
   Address: 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890
   Email: emily.tan@examplecorp.sg
   Phone: +65 9123 4567

2. Mr. John Lim (NRIC: S3456789B)
   Address: 456 Raffles Place, #56-78, Singapore 123456
   Email: john.lim@limventures.sg
   Phone: +65 9234 5678

3. Star Ventures Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 200912345A)
   Address: 789 Marina Bay Sands, #90-12, Singapore 345678
   Phone: +65 9345 6789

RECITALS:

WHEREAS, the parties hereby agree to enter into this Shareholders Agreement (the "SPA") to govern their respective rights and obligations as shareholders.

WHEREAS, the SPA shall not include any project plan or project status updates, which are outside the scope of this Agreement.

1. The total investment under the SPA shall be SGD 500,000.

For further details, please visit https://example.sg/user/S3456789B for obfuscated access to shareholder information.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
